title: Invaded Space
description: (Practically adds nothing as of now) A space Minecraft mod we are making that will capture the creativity of a robot civilization
body: Invaded Space is a mod that adds robot technologies. This mod is set to bring space warships, cargo ships and ships full of robot life that you can find crashed in your world or flying. There is a whole new robot species that is wishing to take over your world and will do so by building structures near any successful ship landings. If you would like to embark on an adventure where robots deem to take over your peaceful world and your job is to save it, this is for you! _This mod is NO WHERE near to being done._
